nasb.text: “I have come into my garden, my sister, my bride; I have gathered my myrrh along with my balsam. I have eaten my honeycomb and my honey; I have drunk my wine and my milk. Eat, friends; Drink and imbibe deeply, O lovers.”

esv.text: I came to my garden, my sister, my bride, I gathered my myrrh with my spice, I ate my honeycomb with my honey, I drank my wine with my milk. Eat, friends, drink, and be drunk with love!

cnv.text: 我的妹妹，我的新婦啊！我進了我的園中； 我採了我的沒藥與香料； 我吃了我的蜂房與蜂蜜； 我喝了我的酒和奶。 朋友們！你們要開懷吃喝； 親愛的啊！你們要不醉無歸。

ccb.text: 我的妹妹，我的新娘啊， 我已经来到自己的园中， 采了我的没药和香料， 品尝了我的蜂房和蜂蜜， 也享用了我的美酒和鲜奶。 朋友们，尽情吃喝吧。 相爱的人啊，沉醉在爱中吧！
